name: best-practices
description: Ecosystem-aware Claude Code — before AI rolls its own solution, checks whether the ecosystem already has a mature one. Four honest tiers (Found / Synthesized / Adapted / Deduced), works for any domain.

plugins.name: best-practices
plugins.description: Before AI rolls its own solution, this plugin checks the ecosystem for mature ones: ✅ Found (multi-source agreement) → 🔧 Synthesized (same-scenario fragments) → 🧩 Adapted (adapted from adjacent scenarios with similar constraints) → 💡 Deduced (first-principles, last resort). Silent auto-search + 5 red-flag detectors + three-step adaptation when no direct answer exists. Use /bp for deep 3-agent investigations.
